theme_archetype.rationale: High energy, command-center focus for the manager dashboard combined with 'tactical' high-visibility for outdoor field crews. Dark theme reduces glare outdoors, and high-vis accent colors command attention for safety and critical actions.

primary_heading.usage: H1, H2, main application titles, statistical numbers, dashboard metrics.

secondary_body.usage: Data tables, task descriptions, UI labels, button text.

hierarchy_rules: H1 (Hero/Main): text-4xl to text-6xl, tracking-tighter, uppercase, font-black
H2 (Section): text-2xl to text-3xl, tracking-tight, uppercase, font-bold
Metrics: text-5xl to text-6xl, font-black, Barlow Condensed, text-white
Body: text-base to text-lg, loose leading for readability in harsh conditions

mobile_field_app: Generous spacing: p-6 or p-8 for task containers.
Glove-friendly touch targets: min-h-[64px] (h-16) or h-20 for all interactive elements, buttons, checkboxes, and inputs.
Cardless flat lists with 1px border dividers to maximize screen real estate and reduce clutter.
manager_dashboard: Bento Grid / Command Center: Dense, tight gap (gap-4 or gap-6).
Grid columns: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 or 12-col layout.
Every pixel utilized: h-full on children to stretch to match neighbors.

component_strategies.buttons: Large, blocky, 0px or 2px max border radius (sharp/rugged). Primary CTA in Safety Orange (#FF5F15) with black text.
component_strategies.validation_checkbox: Oversized square checkbox (h-8 w-8 or h-10 w-10) with thick 2px borders. When checked, fill with Hi-Vis Yellow (#CCFF00) and black checkmark.
component_strategies.photo_capture: Full-width dashed border container (min-h-[120px] or h-32) with central camera icon, encouraging users to tap to snap proof.
component_strategies.surfaces: No soft shadows. Use 1px solid borders (border-zinc-800) for separation. Active states use 2px inner border of Accent color. Backgrounds are strictly solid, no glassmorphism for industrial apps.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Hard color swaps (e.g., bg-zinc-800 to bg-zinc-700), no slow fades. Instant response.
motion_and_interactions.validation_action: Snappy scale down/up on tap. 'Validated' items animate a left-border color to Hi-Vis yellow.
motion_and_interactions.data_testid_rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='validate-task-btn').

images.description: Silhouette of workers on a construction site against sunset sky. Use with bg-black/70 overlay for login/onboarding.
Modern concrete building under construction. Use as project cover image for Walls Abilene Intermediate SS.

specific_views.real_time_task_entry: Task list separated by multi-course tracking (2nd floor, 3rd floor). Each task expands into a checklist + photo capture area + labor hour input (Foreman, Installer, Apprentice).
specific_views.manager_dashboard: Live health dashboard. Use Shadcn charts (Recharts) to show Earned vs Spent ratio, weekly trend, variance by task. Use high-contrast data visualization.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install specific fonts via Google Fonts: Barlow Condensed (600, 700, 900) and IBM Plex Sans (400, 500, 600, 700).
Use lucide-react for icons. Opt for heavy, bold icon weights where possible.
Do NOT use HTML <input type='date'> or <select>. Use Shadcn UI dropdowns and select, heavily customized to look rugged (remove soft border radii).
Implement 'Validation Layer': A task cannot be marked 'Complete' until all sub-checklist items and the Photo Capture requirement are met.
Use data-testid on all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs).
Force dark mode across the entire app by appending 'dark' class to html/body or a root wrapper.
No auth required. User selects a role (Field Crew or Manager) on load to determine view.
